---
name: Technical Debt
about: Track technical improvements and refactoring tasks
title: '[TECH DEBT] '
labels: ['technical-debt', 'maintenance']
assignees: ''
---

## Technical Debt Description

A clear description of the technical debt or improvement needed.

## Current State

Describe the current implementation and why it needs improvement.

## Proposed Improvement

Describe the technical improvement you'd like to implement.

## Impact Assessment

### Code Quality

- [ ] Reduces code complexity
- [ ] Improves maintainability
- [ ] Better error handling
- [ ] Improved testing coverage
- [ ] Better documentation

### Performance

- [ ] Improves load times
- [ ] Reduces server resource usage
- [ ] Better database performance
- [ ] Optimizes API calls (Yelp, Google)
- [ ] Improves mobile performance

### Security

- [ ] Addresses security vulnerability
- [ ] Improves authentication flow
- [ ] Better data protection
- [ ] Reduces attack surface

### Developer Experience

- [ ] Easier to understand code
- [ ] Simpler debugging
- [ ] Better development workflow
- [ ] Improved testing experience

## Affected Areas

### Codebase Components

- [ ] Models (User, Coffeeshop, Review, etc.)
- [ ] Controllers
- [ ] Views/Templates
- [ ] JavaScript/Stimulus controllers
- [ ] CSS/Styling (Tailwind, Materialize)
- [ ] Tests (system, unit, integration)

### External Integrations

- [ ] Yelp Fusion API
- [ ] Google OAuth
- [ ] Google Maps/Geolocation
- [ ] Heroku deployment
- [ ] CI/CD pipeline (GitHub Actions)

### Development Tools

- [ ] Lefthook configuration
- [ ] Linting/Formatting (RuboCop, Prettier)
- [ ] Testing setup (Cuprite, Capybara)
- [ ] Asset pipeline (Propshaft, Importmaps)

## Implementation Plan

### Steps

1. [First step]
2. [Second step]
3. [Additional steps]

### Testing Strategy

- [ ] Existing tests must pass
- [ ] New tests required
- [ ] Performance testing needed
- [ ] Security testing needed

### Migration Considerations

- [ ] Database migrations required
- [ ] Deployment considerations
- [ ] Backward compatibility
- [ ] Data migration needed

## Risk Assessment

- [ ] Low risk - Minor refactoring
- [ ] Medium risk - May affect existing functionality
- [ ] High risk - Significant changes, thorough testing required

## Effort Estimation

- [ ] Small (< 4 hours)
- [ ] Medium (4-16 hours)
- [ ] Large (> 16 hours)

## Success Criteria

How will we know this technical debt has been successfully addressed?

## Additional Context

Any additional information, links to documentation, or related issues.
